description: A property management company must ensure all approved vendors have current liability insurance on file.

nodes.task_description: Identify all vendors whose insurance certificates are set to expire in the next 30 days.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of vendors with expiring insurance.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated email request to each vendor for their updated certificate of insurance.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends out reminder emails.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new certificates, update the expiration date in the vendor's file, and flag any non-responsive vendors.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates compliant vendor files and flags non-compliant ones for follow-up.
